hero.title: Travel with Purpose
hero.subtitle: Discover how tourism can be a force for good, protecting our planet and enriching communities.

commitment.title: Our Sustainable Commitment
commitment.subtitle: We believe that responsible travel is the only way forward. These are our three pillars.

pillars.title: Environmental Protection
pillars.description: We minimize our ecological footprint through partnerships with eco-friendly hotels and carbon offsetting.

pillars.title: Cultural Respect
pillars.description: We promote experiences that value and respect local traditions, history, and way of life.

pillars.title: Community Support
pillars.description: We prioritize local businesses, ensuring that tourism directly benefits those who live in the destination.

practices.title: Our Practices in Action
practices.subtitle: How we turn our commitment into concrete actions in every trip we plan.

items.title: Carbon Reduction
items.description: We actively work to reduce the environmental impact of each trip by promoting conscious choices.
points: We offset 100% of the carbon emissions from flights included in our packages.
We suggest using public or low-carbon transport at destinations.
We choose airlines with more modern and efficient fleets.

items.title: Waste Management
items.description: We encourage a 'leave no trace' philosophy to preserve the natural and cultural beauty of the places we visit.
points: We encourage the use of reusable water bottles and shopping bags.
We partner with hotels that have serious recycling and composting policies.
We have eliminated single-use plastics from our welcome kits.

items.title: Conscious Water Use
items.description: Water is a precious resource in many of our destinations. We promote its responsible use.
points: We support hotels with towel and linen reuse programs.
We inform our travelers about the importance of saving water in vulnerable ecosystems.

items.title: Community Support
items.description: We believe that tourism should economically empower local populations in a fair and sustainable way.
points: We exclusively hire certified local guides for all our excursions.
We recommend family-owned restaurants and locally-owned shops.
We facilitate visits to artisan cooperatives and social projects that benefit the community.

items.title: Respect for Wildlife
items.description: We promote tourism that protects animals and their natural habitats, never exploiting them for entertainment.
points: We do not offer activities involving unethical direct contact with wild animals.
We only work with sanctuaries and reserves that follow strict animal ethics codes.
We educate our travelers on the importance of maintaining a safe distance and not feeding wild animals.

articles.title: Get Inspired on Our Blog
articles.subtitle: Articles, tips, and stories to help you become a more conscious and responsible traveler.

items.title: How to Reduce Your Carbon Footprint When Traveling
items.excerpt: Small changes can have a big impact. Discover practical tips for flying, staying, and moving around more sustainably.

items.title: The Power of Community Tourism: Support Local Development
items.excerpt: Understand how choosing local experiences can transform economies and preserve cultures. A richer, more authentic way to travel.

items.title: Ecotourism in Brazil: 5 Must-See Destinations
items.excerpt: From the Amazon to the Pantanal, Brazil offers incredible natural paradises. Learn how to explore them responsibly and consciously.

joinMovement.title: Join the Responsible Tourism Movement
joinMovement.description: Every trip is an opportunity to make a difference. Start planning your next adventure with us and be part of the change the world needs to see.

page.callToAction: Ready to embark on a sustainable journey? Explore our destinations and start planning your trip today!
